member.name: T:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.CircuitBreakerStrategy
member.summary: Polly requirements for the Circuit breaker resilience strategy. The subjects of this strategy are the and properties.

member.name: F:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.CircuitBreakerStrategy.DefaultBreakDuration
member.summary: Default duration of break the circuit will stay open before resetting, in milliseconds.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.CircuitBreakerStrategy.BreakDuration(System.Int32)
member.summary:
Applies Polly's BreakDuration constraint to the value.
If using Polly v8 or later, and in accordance with Polly's BreakDuration constraint, this value must be greater than (0.5 seconds) and less than (1 day).
member.returns: The same value if the constraint is satisfied; otherwise, the default value ().

member.name: F:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.CircuitBreakerStrategy.DefaultMinimumThroughput
member.summary: Default minimum throughput: this many actions or more must pass through the circuit in the time-slice, for statistics to be considered significant and the circuit-breaker to come into action.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.CircuitBreakerStrategy.MinimumThroughput(System.Int32)
member.summary:
Applies Polly's MinimumThroughput constraint to the value.
If using Polly v8 or later, and in accordance with Polly's MinimumThroughput constraint, this value must be (2) or greater.
member.returns: The same value if the constraint is satisfied; otherwise, the default value ().

member.name: F:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.CircuitBreakerStrategy.DefaultFailureRatio
member.summary: The FailureRatio default value is 0.1 (i.e. 10%).

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.CircuitBreakerStrategy.FailureRatio(System.Double)
member.summary:
Applies Polly's FailureRatio constraint to the value.
If using Polly v8 or later, and in accordance with Polly's FailureRatio constraint, this value must be greater than (0) and less than (1).
member.returns: The same value if the constraint is satisfied; otherwise, the default value ().

member.name: F:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.CircuitBreakerStrategy.DefaultSamplingDuration
member.summary: The SamplingDuration default value is 30 seconds, in milliseconds.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.CircuitBreakerStrategy.SamplingDuration(System.Int32)
member.summary:
Applies Polly's SamplingDuration constraint to the value.
If using Polly v8 or later, and in accordance with Polly's SamplingDuration constraint, this value must be greater than (0.5 seconds) and less than (1 day).
member.returns: The same value if the constraint is satisfied; otherwise, the default value ().

member.name: T:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.Interfaces.IPollyQoSResiliencePipelineProvider`1
member.summary: Defines provider for Polly V8 pipelines.
member.typeparam: An HTTP result type, usually it is type.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.Interfaces.IPollyQoSResiliencePipelineProvider`1.GetResiliencePipeline(Ocelot.Configuration.DownstreamRoute)
member.summary: Gets Polly v8 pipeline.
member.param: The route to apply a pipeline for.

member.name: F:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotBuilderExtensions.DefaultErrorMapping
member.summary: Default mapping of Polly s to objects.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotBuilderExtensions.AddPolly``1(Ocelot.DependencyInjection.IOcelotBuilder,Ocelot.QualityOfService.QosDelegatingHandlerDelegate,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.Type,System.Func{System.Exception,Ocelot.Errors.Error}})
member.summary: Adds Polly QoS provider to Ocelot by custom delegate and with custom error mapping.
member.typeparam: QoS provider to use (by default use ).
member.param: Your customized delegating handler (to manage QoS behavior by yourself).
member.returns: The reference to the same extended object.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotBuilderExtensions.AddPolly``1(Ocelot.DependencyInjection.IOcelotBuilder,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.Type,System.Func{System.Exception,Ocelot.Errors.Error}})
member.summary: Adds Polly QoS provider to Ocelot with custom error mapping, but default is used.
member.typeparam: QoS provider to use (by default use ).
member.returns: The reference to the same extended object.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotBuilderExtensions.AddPolly``1(Ocelot.DependencyInjection.IOcelotBuilder,Ocelot.QualityOfService.QosDelegatingHandlerDelegate)
member.summary: Adds Polly QoS provider to Ocelot with custom delegate, but default error mapping is used.
member.typeparam: QoS provider to use (by default use ).
member.param: Your customized delegating handler (to manage QoS behavior by yourself).
member.returns: The reference to the same extended object.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotBuilderExtensions.AddPolly``1(Ocelot.DependencyInjection.IOcelotBuilder)
member.summary: Adds Polly QoS provider to Ocelot by defaults.
member.typeparam: QoS provider to use (by default use ).
member.returns: The reference to the same extended object.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotBuilderExtensions.AddPolly(Ocelot.DependencyInjection.IOcelotBuilder)
member.summary: Adds Polly QoS provider to Ocelot by defaults with default QoS provider.
member.returns: The reference to the same extended object.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotBuilderExtensions.GetDelegatingHandler(Ocelot.Configuration.DownstreamRoute,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IHttpContextAccessor,Ocelot.Logging.IOcelotLoggerFactory)
member.summary: Creates default delegating handler based on the type.
member.param: The downstream route to apply the handler for.
The context accessor of the route.
member.returns: A object, but concrete type is the class.

member.name: T:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotResiliencePipelineKey
member.summary: Object used to identify a resilience pipeline in .
member.param: The key for the resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotResiliencePipelineKey.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Object used to identify a resilience pipeline in .
member.param: The key for the resilience pipeline.

member.name: P:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.OcelotResiliencePipelineKey.Key
member.summary: The key for the resilience pipeline.

member.name: T:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.PollyQoSResiliencePipelineProvider
member.summary: Default provider for Polly V8 pipelines.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.PollyQoSResiliencePipelineProvider.GetResiliencePipeline(Ocelot.Configuration.DownstreamRoute)
member.summary: Gets Polly V8 resilience pipeline (applies QoS feature) for the route.
member.param: The downstream route to apply the pipeline for.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.PollyQoSResiliencePipelineProvider.ConfigureCircuitBreaker(Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder{System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage},Ocelot.Configuration.DownstreamRoute)
member.summary: Configures the Circuit breaker resilience strategy.
member.param: The route the pipeline is applied to.
member.returns: The same pipeline builder, as an object where TResult is .

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.PollyQoSResiliencePipelineProvider.ConfigureTimeout(Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder{System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage},Ocelot.Configuration.DownstreamRoute)
member.summary: Configures the Timeout resilience strategy.
member.param: The route the pipeline is applied to.
member.returns: The same pipeline builder, as an object where TResult is .

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.PollyResiliencePipelineDelegatingHandler.SendAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an HTTP request to the inner handler to send to the server as an asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Exception thrown when a circuit is broken.

member.name: T:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.TimeoutStrategy
member.summary: Polly requirements for the Timeout resilience strategy. The subject of this strategy is the property.

member.name: M:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.TimeoutStrategy.Timeout(System.Int32)
member.summary:
Applies Polly's Timeout constraint to the value.
If using Polly v8 or later, and in accordance with Polly's Timeout constraint, this value must be greater than (10 milliseconds) and less than (24 hours).
member.returns: The same value if the constraint is satisfied; otherwise, .

member.name: P:Ocelot.Provider.Polly.TimeoutStrategy.DefaultTimeout
member.summary:
Gets or sets the default timeout in milliseconds, which overrides Polly's default of 30 seconds.
The setter enforces Polly's Timeout constraint that the assigned value must fall within the range (, ).
